symptom_vector: JVM exception thrown, application runtime error with exception stack trace.

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [adservice-1] (From Ground Truth). Verified in Full Context `raw_log_result.unique_entities.pod_name`.

Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [adservice-getrandomads-exception] in Log. Specifically in log line: 'RuleTriggerMethodAdapter.injectTriggerPoint : inserting trigger into hipstershop.AdService.getRandomAds() java.util.List for rule AdService-getRandomAds-exception-1749525035' (From GT key_observations, From Full Context `raw_log_result.filtered_logs`).

Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [invocationtargetexception] in Log. Specifically in log line: 'Exception in thread "Attach Listener" java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException' (From GT key_observations, From Full Context `raw_log_result.filtered_logs`).

Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [transformlistener] in Log. Specifically in log line: 'org.jboss.byteman.agent.Transformer : possible trigger for rule AdService-getRandomAds-exception-1749525035 in class hipstershop.AdService' (From GT key_observations, From Full Context `raw_log_result.filtered_logs`).

Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on the combined presence of the faulty component [adservice-1] and the specific keywords [adservice-getrandomads-exception, invocationtargetexception, transformlistener] in its logs, determined cause is [adservice-getrandomads-exception] (From Ground Truth `key_metrics`).

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log line containing 'AdService-getRandomAds-exception' appears, indicating a Byteman rule trigger was injected into the `AdService.getRandomAds()` method.
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'AdService-getRandomAds-exception' in the logs of pod 'adservice-1' within the fault time window.
